node.text: Dave started working on cars at the age of ten after finding an old car in a neighbor's garage.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "customized shiny finish") on Observation 4 (Score: 0.51)

node.text: Dave restored a car last year but sold it to a collector and is currently working on a new project.
Dave believes paying attention to details in car restoration makes a big impact.
Dave mentions a guitar that shows their different artistic styles, which he appreciates.
Dave recently attended a conference in Detroit and learned a lot from it.
